sglang.title: Hicache Storage Layer Prototype
sglang.author: xiezhq-hermann
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR aims to introduce a standard storage interface for hierarchical KV caching (first introduced in #2693), so that the community can plug in different storage backend like Mooncake.
Recently, there are PR and proposals to integrate storage layer into the hierarchical KV caching eco-s

Reverts #7760
Causing AMD performance CI failures. See: https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/actions/runs/16364699908/job/46239248927

I add fallback method in #8090 which makes green context stream compatible in different CUDA enviroment in compiling phase. This PR applies a dynamic method to enhence the robust.
related issue: #8131

sglang.title: fix compressed tensors WNA16 imports
sglang.author: qeternity
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current compressed tensors WNA16 implementation is broken due to bad imports.
I understand the long term plan is to deprecate compressed tensors, but in the interim, we should support this.
Modifications
Fix imports.

sglang.title: [3/n] chore: decouple AWQ implementation from vLLM dependency
sglang.author: Hongbosherlock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
follow #7992
The primary goal of this change is to enhance the consistency and stability of SGLang's quantization features. By decoupling the quantization implementation from its vLLM dependency, we aim to make the module easier to maintain and more portable.
Full realization of this goal

sglang.title: [router] Refactor router and policy traits with dependency injection
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR introduces a comprehensive architectural refactoring of the SGLang router to improve code maintainability, extensibility, and feature parity between routing modes. Previously, the regular router and PD (Prefill-Decode) router had separate implementations with different supported l

sglang.title: [AMD] Add triton awq_dequantize kernel to support AWQ on ROCm
sglang.author: hubertlu-tw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is part of the efforts to decouple vLLM dependency in SGLang for ROCm.

Modifications

Add awq_dequantize_triton kernel
Add test_awq_dequantize.py and add it to AMD's CI (per-commit-amd)


To run the tests locally,
cd test/srt
python3 -m unittest test_awq.py
python3 -m unittest test_

sglang.title: chore: tune mem fraction static for vlm
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, the --mem-fraction-static from server_args will be multiplied with a fixed factor F(0.9) for multimodal models.
mem_fraction_static = original_mem_fraction_static * F
For vlms (or multimodal models), where additional modules (e.g. Vit) are involved, this factor F should be dyna

sglang.title: Support NVFP4 quantized dense models on AMD CDNA2/CDNA3 GPUs
sglang.author: haohui
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR leverages Petit to efficiently emulate FP4 supports on AMD CDNA2 / CDNA3 GPUs, so that they can run FP4 quantized models such as Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-FP4

Modifications

This PR adds a new quantization scheme, petit_fp4 to support fp4 models quantized by ModelOpt.

The

sglang.author: byjiang1996
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Issue: #6544
Currently basic text + image support have been supported in phi4-mm but audio support is missing.
Modifications

Commit1: Refactor phi4-mm IMAGE support so it is easier to add AUDIO support in commit2
Commit2:

Port python/sglang/srt/models/phi4mm_audio.py and python/sglang/s

sglang.title: [PD] Support non-MLA models PD different TP with DP attention
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix slice logics to repair the accuracy when using different TP with DP attention for PD disaggregation.
Before this PR:
python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3-8B --port 30000 --host 192.168.0.137 --disaggregation-mode prefill  --tp-size 4 --trust-remote-code --page-size 3

sglang.title: [health_generate] fix: fix the /health_generate always success bug
sglang.author: acelyc111
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The /health_generate uses a fake request to simulate client request and judge if it succeed by comparing timestamps of sending the request and response from detokenizer. But they have different meanings, one is monotonic time.perf_counter() but the other is wall-clock time.time(). This p

sglang.title: [router] router metrics cleanup
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR addresses issue #7537  by implementing a centralized observability module for the SGL router. The current metrics implementation is scattered throughout the codebase with inconsistent naming conventions, making it difficult to maintain and extend. This PR refactors the metrics sys

sglang.title: [router] allow router to have empty workers
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #8148. The router crashes when launched without --worker-urls, preventing dynamic worker registration.
Modifications

Changed --worker-urls from nargs="+" to nargs="*" with default=[]
Updated test comment to reflect new behavior
Added test for empty worker URLs argument parsing

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Allocate less memory in non-batched CUTLASS MoE
vllm.author: ElizaWszola
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The way we obtain N from _moe_problem_size() caused the function to allocate up to twice as much memory in cutlass_moe's workspace_shapes() as needed. The fix brings down the size of workspaces to what actually reflects the size needed to store cutlass_moe's intermediate tensors.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Apply torch.Tag.needs_fixed_stride_order only for torch==2.6.0
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
In torch 2.6.0, torch accidentally changed the default for custom operators to be "requires_contiguous". As a workaround, vLLM added needs_fixed_stride_order to a large number of custom operators.
vLLM is currently on torch 2.7.0 which has reverted the default for custom operators back to n

Optimizations
As a common trick for doubly linked list implementation, introducing fake head and tail nodes would significantly reduce the implementation overhead, and help us to get rid of dataclass.eq comparison easily.

No dataclass.eq invocation
Shorter code
Branchless

Mistral-Small-3.1-24B-Instruct-2503 is a multi-modal model. The model has 3 sub-modules,

language_model
multi_modal_projector
vision_tower
The logits_processor module is contained within the language_model module.
on main, due to the nested structure, LoRA layer replacement logic fails to r

tokens=8: 	quant_silu_mul 0.056ms 	
tokens=16: 	quant_silu_mul
